concerns.text: Task T026 validates algorithm implementation for CORE invariants (crossing number, braid index) against KnotInfo. Spec FR-003 and SC-008 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED from Knot Atlas (not computed) and algorithm validation applies ONLY to additional invariants in Phase 2+. This task weakens the explicit Phase 1 scope boundary.

Plan Constitution Check Principle VI states 'computed invariants will be verified against primary mathematical literature' without Phase 1/Phase 2+ distinction. Spec FR-003 explicitly states 'additional invariants MUST NOT be computed in Phase 1 implementation'. This creates spec-plan contradiction on scope boundary.

Task T041 (source independence assessment) is placed in Phase 5 (regression analysis) under User Story 3. Spec FR-013 requires this documentation in reproducibility artifacts (docs/reproducibility/hyperbolic_volume_validation.md), not regression-specific outputs. Should be moved to Phase 4.
Task T043 duplicates Task T009. Both implement 'flagging system for missing invariant flags (missing_invariant_flags) in code/data/validator.py (per FR-009)'. Remove T043 to avoid redundant work.

Tasks T065-T066 appear in both Phase 2 (Foundational) AND Phase N (Polish). T065 is listed as 'Implement citation validation framework' in Phase 2, then again as '[Reviewer: marie-curie]' task in Phase N. Remove from one location to avoid duplication.

Task T049 states 'Generate timestamped logs for all operations in docs/reproducibility/logs.md' but Spec FR-007 requires actual timestamped log files capturing operation/input/output/parameters/status/duration_ms for reproducibility, not just documentation ABOUT logs. Clarify deliverable.

Tasks T062-T066 address reviewer concerns (dan-rockmore, marie-curie-simulated) but are not explicitly mandated in spec.md requirements. While stakeholder feedback is valuable, these should be marked as optional or deferred to Phase 2+ to avoid scope creep beyond authorized deliverables.
